swissarmyhammer-commands/src/ui_state.rs

Coverage: 46.3% (146/315 lines)

Uncovered functions:
- load / read_from_file / save (persistence round-trip, lines 212-263)
- inspect / inspector_close / inspector_close_all / set_inspector_stack (inspector management)

- save_window_geometry / update_window_geometry / get_window_state / all_windows (window geometry persistence)
- to_json (serialization, lines 893-923)

What to test: Construct UIState, exercise each method, verify state mutations. Test save/load round-trip with temp file. Test inspector stack push/pop. Test window geometry save/restore.
Add tests for UIState persistence and window management
